allow: Bash(printf 'package ui;\\n\\nimport javax.swing.JPanel;\\nimport java.awt.Color;\\nimport java.awt.Dimension;\\nimport java.awt.Graphics;\\nimport java.awt.Graphics2D;\\n\\n// deals with switching screens\\npublic class GamePanel extends JPanel {\\n\\n    static final int SCREEN_WIDTH = 800;\\n    static final int SCREEN_HEIGHT = 600;\\n\\n    public GamePanel\(\) {\\n        setPreferredSize\(new Dimension\(SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT\)\);\\n        setBackground\(Color.BLACK\);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    protected void paintComponent\(Graphics g\) {\\n        super.paintComponent\(g\);\\n        Graphics2D g2 = \(Graphics2D\) g;\\n\\n        // test - draw a white rectangle in the center\\n        g2.setColor\(Color.WHITE\);\\n        g2.fillRect\(350, 250, 100, 100\);\\n    }\\n}\\n')

Bash(printf 'package ui;\\n\\nimport ui.screens.MenuScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.GameScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.PauseScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.SettingsScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.HelpScreen;\\nimport javax.imageio.ImageIO;\\nimport javax.swing.JPanel;\\nimport java.awt.Color;\\nimport java.awt.Dimension;\\nimport java.awt.Graphics;\\nimport java.awt.Graphics2D;\\nimport java.awt.image.BufferedImage;\\nimport java.io.File;\\nimport java.io.IOException;\\n\\n// deals with switching screens\\npublic class GamePanel extends JPanel {\\n\\n    static final int SCREEN_WIDTH = 800;\\n    static final int SCREEN_HEIGHT = 600;\\n    static final int TILE_SIZE = 32;\\n\\n    // screens\\n    MenuScreen menuScreen = new MenuScreen\(\);\\n    GameScreen gameScreen = new GameScreen\(\);\\n    PauseScreen pauseScreen = new PauseScreen\(\);\\n    SettingsScreen settingsScreen = new SettingsScreen\(\);\\n    HelpScreen helpScreen = new HelpScreen\(\);\\n\\n    // screen states\\n    boolean showMenu = true;\\n    boolean showGame = false;\\n    boolean showPause = false;\\n    boolean showSettings = false;\\n    boolean showHelp = false;\\n\\n    // assets\\n    BufferedImage grassTile;\\n\\n    public GamePanel\(\) {\\n        setPreferredSize\(new Dimension\(SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT\)\);\\n        setBackground\(Color.BLACK\);\\n        loadAssets\(\);\\n    }\\n\\n    private void loadAssets\(\) {\\n        try {\\n            grassTile = ImageIO.read\(new File\(""assets/tiles/grass_tile.png""\)\);\\n        } catch \(IOException e\) {\\n            System.out.println\(""Could not load grass_tile.png""\);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    public void switchScreen\(String screen\) {\\n        // turn all off\\n        showMenu = false;\\n        showGame = false;\\n        showPause = false;\\n        showSettings = false;\\n        showHelp = false;\\n\\n        // turn on the one you want\\n        switch \(screen\) {\\n            case ""menu""     -> showMenu = true;\\n            case ""game""     -> showGame = true;\\n            case ""pause""    -> showPause = true;\\n            case ""settings"" -> showSettings = true;\\n            case ""help""     -> showHelp = true;\\n        }\\n\\n        repaint\(\);\\n    }\\n\\n    private void drawTiles\(Graphics2D g\) {\\n        if \(grassTile == null\) return;\\n        for \(int x = 0; x < SCREEN_WIDTH; x += TILE_SIZE\) {\\n            for \(int y = 0; y < SCREEN_HEIGHT; y += TILE_SIZE\) {\\n                g.drawImage\(grassTile, x, y, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE, null\);\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    protected void paintComponent\(Graphics g\) {\\n        super.paintComponent\(g\);\\n        Graphics2D g2 = \(Graphics2D\) g;\\n\\n        drawTiles\(g2\);\\n\\n        if \(showMenu\)     menuScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showGame\)     gameScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showPause\)    pauseScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showSettings\) settingsScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showHelp\)     helpScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n    }\\n}\\n')

Bash(printf 'package ui;\\n\\nimport world.GameMap;\\nimport ui.screens.MenuScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.GameScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.PauseScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.SettingsScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.HelpScreen;\\nimport javax.swing.JPanel;\\nimport java.awt.Color;\\nimport java.awt.Dimension;\\nimport java.awt.Graphics;\\nimport java.awt.Graphics2D;\\n\\n// deals with switching screens\\npublic class GamePanel extends JPanel {\\n\\n    static final int SCREEN_WIDTH = 800;\\n    static final int SCREEN_HEIGHT = 600;\\n\\n    // world\\n    GameMap gameMap = new GameMap\(\);\\n\\n    // screens\\n    MenuScreen menuScreen = new MenuScreen\(\);\\n    GameScreen gameScreen = new GameScreen\(\);\\n    PauseScreen pauseScreen = new PauseScreen\(\);\\n    SettingsScreen settingsScreen = new SettingsScreen\(\);\\n    HelpScreen helpScreen = new HelpScreen\(\);\\n\\n    // screen states\\n    boolean showMenu = true;\\n    boolean showGame = false;\\n    boolean showPause = false;\\n    boolean showSettings = false;\\n    boolean showHelp = false;\\n\\n    public GamePanel\(\) {\\n        setPreferredSize\(new Dimension\(SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT\)\);\\n        setBackground\(Color.BLACK\);\\n    }\\n\\n    public void switchScreen\(String screen\) {\\n        // turn all off\\n        showMenu = false;\\n        showGame = false;\\n        showPause = false;\\n        showSettings = false;\\n        showHelp = false;\\n\\n        // turn on the one you want\\n        switch \(screen\) {\\n            case ""menu""     -> showMenu = true;\\n            case ""game""     -> showGame = true;\\n            case ""pause""    -> showPause = true;\\n            case ""settings"" -> showSettings = true;\\n            case ""help""     -> showHelp = true;\\n        }\\n\\n        repaint\(\);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    protected void paintComponent\(Graphics g\) {\\n        super.paintComponent\(g\);\\n        Graphics2D g2 = \(Graphics2D\) g;\\n\\n        gameMap.draw\(g2, SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT\);\\n\\n        if \(showMenu\)     menuScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showGame\)     gameScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showPause\)    pauseScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showSettings\) settingsScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showHelp\)     helpScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n    }\\n}\\n')

Bash(printf 'package ui;\\n\\nimport ui.screens.MenuScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.GameScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.PauseScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.SettingsScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.HelpScreen;\\nimport javax.swing.JPanel;\\nimport java.awt.Color;\\nimport java.awt.Dimension;\\nimport java.awt.Graphics;\\nimport java.awt.Graphics2D;\\n\\n// deals with switching screens\\npublic class GamePanel extends JPanel {\\n\\n    static final int SCREEN_WIDTH = 800;\\n    static final int SCREEN_HEIGHT = 600;\\n\\n    // screens\\n    MenuScreen menuScreen = new MenuScreen\(\);\\n    GameScreen gameScreen = new GameScreen\(\);\\n    PauseScreen pauseScreen = new PauseScreen\(\);\\n    SettingsScreen settingsScreen = new SettingsScreen\(\);\\n    HelpScreen helpScreen = new HelpScreen\(\);\\n\\n    // screen states\\n    boolean showMenu = false;\\n    boolean showGame = true;\\n    boolean showPause = false;\\n    boolean showSettings = false;\\n    boolean showHelp = false;\\n\\n    public GamePanel\(\) {\\n        setPreferredSize\(new Dimension\(SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT\)\);\\n        setBackground\(Color.BLACK\);\\n    }\\n\\n    public void switchScreen\(String screen\) {\\n        // turn all off\\n        showMenu = false;\\n        showGame = false;\\n        showPause = false;\\n        showSettings = false;\\n        showHelp = false;\\n\\n        // turn on the one you want\\n        switch \(screen\) {\\n            case ""menu""     -> showMenu = true;\\n            case ""game""     -> showGame = true;\\n            case ""pause""    -> showPause = true;\\n            case ""settings"" -> showSettings = true;\\n            case ""help""     -> showHelp = true;\\n        }\\n\\n        repaint\(\);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    protected void paintComponent\(Graphics g\) {\\n        super.paintComponent\(g\);\\n        Graphics2D g2 = \(Graphics2D\) g;\\n\\n        if \(showMenu\)     menuScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showGame\)     gameScreen.draw\(g2, SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT\);\\n        if \(showPause\)    pauseScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showSettings\) settingsScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showHelp\)     helpScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n    }\\n}\\n')

Bash(printf 'package ui;\\n\\nimport ui.screens.MenuScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.GameScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.PauseScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.SettingsScreen;\\nimport ui.screens.HelpScreen;\\nimport util.KeyHandler;\\nimport javax.swing.JPanel;\\nimport java.awt.Color;\\nimport java.awt.Dimension;\\nimport java.awt.Graphics;\\nimport java.awt.Graphics2D;\\n\\n// deals with switching screens\\npublic class GamePanel extends JPanel implements Runnable {\\n\\n    static final int SCREEN_WIDTH = 800;\\n    static final int SCREEN_HEIGHT = 600;\\n    static final int FPS = 60;\\n\\n    // input\\n    KeyHandler keyHandler = new KeyHandler\(\);\\n\\n    // screens\\n    MenuScreen menuScreen = new MenuScreen\(\);\\n    GameScreen gameScreen = new GameScreen\(\);\\n    PauseScreen pauseScreen = new PauseScreen\(\);\\n    SettingsScreen settingsScreen = new SettingsScreen\(\);\\n    HelpScreen helpScreen = new HelpScreen\(\);\\n\\n    // screen states\\n    boolean showMenu = false;\\n    boolean showGame = true;\\n    boolean showPause = false;\\n    boolean showSettings = false;\\n    boolean showHelp = false;\\n\\n    Thread gameThread;\\n\\n    public GamePanel\(\) {\\n        setPreferredSize\(new Dimension\(SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT\)\);\\n        setBackground\(Color.BLACK\);\\n        addKeyListener\(keyHandler\);\\n        setFocusable\(true\);\\n        gameThread = new Thread\(this\);\\n        gameThread.start\(\);\\n    }\\n\\n    public void switchScreen\(String screen\) {\\n        showMenu = false;\\n        showGame = false;\\n        showPause = false;\\n        showSettings = false;\\n        showHelp = false;\\n\\n        switch \(screen\) {\\n            case ""menu""     -> showMenu = true;\\n            case ""game""     -> showGame = true;\\n            case ""pause""    -> showPause = true;\\n            case ""settings"" -> showSettings = true;\\n            case ""help""     -> showHelp = true;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public void run\(\) {\\n        double drawInterval = 1000000000.0 / FPS;\\n        double delta = 0;\\n        long lastTime = System.nanoTime\(\);\\n\\n        while \(gameThread != null\) {\\n            long currentTime = System.nanoTime\(\);\\n            delta += \(currentTime - lastTime\) / drawInterval;\\n            lastTime = currentTime;\\n\\n            if \(delta >= 1\) {\\n                update\(\);\\n                repaint\(\);\\n                delta--;\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private void update\(\) {\\n        if \(showGame\) gameScreen.update\(keyHandler, SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT\);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    protected void paintComponent\(Graphics g\) {\\n        super.paintComponent\(g\);\\n        Graphics2D g2 = \(Graphics2D\) g;\\n\\n        if \(showMenu\)     menuScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showGame\)     gameScreen.draw\(g2, SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT\);\\n        if \(showPause\)    pauseScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showSettings\) settingsScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n        if \(showHelp\)     helpScreen.draw\(g2\);\\n    }\\n}\\n')
